politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: This Privacy Statement describes the personal data we collect and/or process (which may include collecting, organizing, structuring, storing, using, or disclosing) to provide products and services offered directly by Zoom Communications, Inc. ("Zoom")

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Zoom Communications, Inc.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can contact our Data Protection Officer by sending an email to privacy@zoom.us.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
- **Account Information**: Information associated with an account that licenses Zoom products and services, which may include administrator name, contact information, account ID, billing and transaction information, and account plan information.
- **Profile and Participant Information:**Information associated with the Zoom profile of a user who uses Zoom products and services under a licensed account or that is provided by an unlicensed participant joining a meeting, which may include name, display name, picture, email address, phone number, job information, stated locale, user ID, or other information provided by the user and/or their account owner.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **As necessary for our contract:**When we enter into a contract directly with you, we process your personal data on the basis of our contract in order to prepare and enter into the contract, as well as to perform and manage our contract (i.e., providing Zoom products and services, features and services to account owners, their users, and those they invite to join meetings and webinars hosted on their accounts, and manage our relationship and contract, including billing, compliance with contractual obligations, and related administration).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If we do not process your personal data for these purposes, we may not be able to provide you with all products and services

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We retain personal data for as long as required to engage in the uses described in this Privacy Statement, unless a longer retention period is required by applicable law.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
- **Resellers:**If an account owner licensed or purchased Zoom products and services from a third-party reseller of Zoom products and services, the reseller may be able to access personal data and content for users, including meetings, webinars, and messages hosted by the account owner.
- **Vendors:**Zoom works with third-party service providers to provide, support, and improve Zoom products and services and technical infrastructure, and for business services such as payment processing, including in relation to purchases made through the Zoom App Marketplace.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Prise de décision automatisée
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Zoom provides intelligent features and products to its customers, their licensed end users and guests, such as Zoom AI or other tools to recommend chat, email, or other content, including content from third-party integrations. These tools may use artificial intelligence, machine learning, or other technology to process Customer Content and context solely to provide the intelligent features.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Zoom uses advanced tools to automatically scan certain types of content such as virtual backgrounds, profile images, incoming emails to Zoom’s native email service from someone who is not a Zoom Email user, and files uploaded or exchanged through chat, for the purpose detecting and preventing violations of our terms or policies and illegal or other harmful activity.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Zoom obtains information about account owners and their users from third-party companies, such as market data enrichment services, including information about an account owner’s company size or industry, contact information, or activity of certain enterprise domains.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Zoom obtains information from third-party companies, such as market data enrichment services

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You also have the right to lodge a complaint to a data protection authority.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Right to rectification**: You have the right to require us to correct any inaccurate or incomplete personal data;

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Right of access and/or portability**: You have the right to access any personal data that we hold about you and, in some circumstances, have that data provided to you so that you can provide or “port” that data to another provider;

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Right of erasure**: In certain circumstances, you have the right to the erasure of personal data that we hold about you (for example, if it is no longer necessary for the purposes for which it was originally collected);

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Right to restrict processing**: You have the right to request that we restrict processing of your personal data in certain circumstances (for example, where you believe that the personal data we hold about you is not accurate or lawfully held).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Right of access and/or portability**: You have the right to access any personal data that we hold about you and, in some circumstances, have that data provided to you so that you can provide or “port” that data to another provider;

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Right to object to processing**: In certain circumstances, you have the right to request that we stop processing your personal data and/or stop sending you marketing communications;

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Last updated: February 02, 2026

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: If you don’t want to learn about products and services we or our partners offer, you can opt-out of marketing communications in the communication sent to you (for example, via email or SMS), or by emailing privacy@zoom.us. [...] You can get more information and opt out of the use of cookies and other trackers on our website and app by clicking the Your Privacy Choices, also on our homepage, and setting your preferences.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: Zoom may permit advertising and analytics services that are intended to deliver advertising to you and/or analyze your interactions, based on your interactions with our website or app which may constitute a “sale” or “sharing” of data for targeted advertising purposes under certain state privacy laws.

cookies.label: Liste des partenaires à jour
cookies.quote: Zoom uses third-party marketing, advertising, and analytics providers: to provide statistics and analysis about how people are using Zoom products and services, including our website; and to provide advertising and marketing for Zoom products and services, including targeted advertising based on your use of our website.

cookies.label: Détail des finalités (2e niveau)
cookies.quote: - **Marketing and Promotions:**If authorized by any applicable settings, to permit Zoom and/or its third party marketing partners to market, advertise, and promote Zoom products and services, including based on your product usage, information we receive from third-party partners, information you provide to process referral invitations, or if you visit our websites, information about how and when you visit, and your interactions with them.

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés
Outil de mesure d'audience mentionné
cookies.quote: Zoom may use advertising and analytics services that are intended to analyze your interactions with our website or app

cookies.label: Consentement requis pour l'outil statistique
cookies.quote: We rely on your prior consent in order to utilize cookies to engage advertising and analytics partners to deliver tailored advertising and analysis of our website usage.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: Zoom operates globally, which means personal data may be transferred, stored (for example, in a data center), and processed outside of the country or region where it was initially collected where Zoom or its service providers have customers or facilities – including in countries where meeting participants or account owners hosting meetings or webinars that you participate in or receiving messages that you send are based.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs
transferts_hors_ue.quote: Zoom operates globally, which means personal data may be transferred, stored (for example, in a data center), and processed outside of the country or region where it was initially collected where Zoom or its service providers have customers or facilities
